creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Fri Nov 22 16:38:39 2013
New Revision: 334599
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/334599

Log:
  sysutils/ansible: Update to 1.4
  
  - Update to 1.4
  - Update pkg-plist
  - QA: Dependencies are only RUN_DEPENDS, not BUILD_DEPENDS
  - QA: Whitespace alignment
  - QA: Clarify ACCELERATE option description
  
  Changes:
  
  https://raw.github.com/ansible/ansible/v1.4.0/CHANGELOG.md
  
  PR:		ports/184171
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ansible/distinfo
  head/sysutils/ansible/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile	Fri Nov 22 15:07:38 2013	(r334598)
+++ head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile	Fri Nov 22 16:38:39 2013	(r334599)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ansible
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.4
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ansibleworks.com/releases/
 
@@ -10,17 +10,16 @@ COMMENT=	Simple ssh-based configuration 
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}paramiko>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-paramiko \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Jinja2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-Jinja2
-RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}paramiko>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-paramiko \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Jinja2>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-Jinja2
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	ACCELERATE EXAMPLES
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=		ACCELERATE EXAMPLES
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	ACCELERATE
 
-ACCELERATE_DESC=	Enable accelerate mode
-ACCELERATE_RUN_DEPENDS=${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}keyczar>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-keyczar
+ACCELERATE_DESC=	Enable Accelerated Mode (Uses pycrypto and keyczar)
+ACCELERATE_RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto \
+			${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}keyczar>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-keyczar
 
 USE_PYTHON=		2
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes

==============================================================================

+++ head/sysutils/ansible/distinfo	Fri Nov 22 16:38:39 2013	(r334599)

+SIZE (ansible-1.4.tar.gz) = 573223
